# GDS API reference

> **Generated from the live route files** ‚Äî the route file is authoritative. 246 endpoints across 41 route files.
> Machine-readable spec: [`docs/api/openapi.json`](api/openapi.json) (OpenAPI 3.1). Rendered docs site: **`/docs`** (e.g. `cloudbongos.com/docs`).

Base path: `/api/bongos`. Ranks (enforced server-side, [ADR 0016](adr/0016-trust-boundary-server-enforced-permissions.md)): `public` < `any-builder` < `metic+archon` < `archon`.

## `access-requests` (4)

| Method | Path | Rank | Body | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/bongos/access-requests` | `archon` | ‚Äî | GET /access-requests?status=pending ‚Äî Archon queue. |

| PATCH | `/api/bongos/access-requests/:id` | `archon` | `status` | PATCH /access-requests/:id ‚Äî Archon resolves a request. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/access-requests/status` | `public` | ‚Äî | GET /access-requests/status?github_login=X ‚Äî PUBLIC. |

## `auth` (17)

| Method | Path | Rank | Body | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/app-pair/approve` | `any-builder` | `pair_code` | (own identity only) ‚Äî approving signs the app in AS THE APPROVER. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/auth/app-pair/info` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | read-only: what the approve page shows BEFORE the click (device name/platform for the given code). |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/app-pair/poll` | `public` | `poll_token` | poll with the secret poll_token; the token IS the bearer (mirrors /auth/device/poll, where the device_code is the bearer). |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/app-pair/start` | `public` | `device_name`, `platform` | starts a pairing; returns opaque codes only, no identity. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/backchannel-logout` | `public` | `logout_token` | POST /auth/backchannel-logout ‚Äî the INSTANCE side of federated single-logout (ADR 0144, task 1002238). |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/cli-token/issue` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | POST /auth/cli-token/issue ‚Äî V3.R91 / task 401. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/device/exchange` | `public` | `assertion` | POST /auth/device/exchange ‚Äî CLI federation (ADR 0141 ¬ß1). |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/device/poll` | `public` | `device_code` | auth flow; the device code itself is the bearer. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/device/start` | `public` | ‚Äî | /auth/device ‚Äî CLI flow rank: public ‚Äî auth flow itself; identity establishment, not authorization. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/auth/discord/callback` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | completes the link to the caller's own identity. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/auth/discord/start` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | /auth/discord ‚Äî account-linking OAuth (Phase 3 F2, ADR 0033 ¬ß2). |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/discord/unlink` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | unlink your OWN Discord. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/logout` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | own session, no rank gate (a Xenos can log themselves out). |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/revoke` | `archon` | `session_id` | POST /auth/revoke ‚Äî V3.R38 / task 259. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/auth/revoke-all` | `archon` | `builder_id` | POST /auth/revoke-all ‚Äî V3.R38 / task 259. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/auth/web/callback` | `public` | ‚Äî | OAuth callback; the state cookie + code are the bearer. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/auth/web/start` | `public` | ‚Äî | /auth/web ‚Äî browser flow (used by the /builders page). |

## `blockers` (5)

| Method | Path | Rank | Body | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/bongos/blockers` | `public` | ‚Äî | List currently-open blockers + the tasks each is blocking. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/blockers` | `any-builder` | `title`, `body_md`, `source`, `source_ref` | FILE a blocker (contribution, not resolution). |

## `box` (17)

| Method | Path | Rank | Body | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/bongos/box/authorized-keys` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | GET /box/authorized-keys ‚Äî the box pulls its builder's authorized_keys. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/box/close` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | POST /box/close ‚Äî the builder manually requests their box be deprovisioned. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/box/connect` | `public` | ‚Äî | GET /box/connect ‚Äî the human/Claude-readable connect walkthrough. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/box/connect.ps1` | `public` | ‚Äî | GET /box/connect.ps1 ‚Äî the Windows (PowerShell) bootstrap script. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/box/connect.sh` | `public` | ‚Äî | GET /box/connect.sh ‚Äî the macOS/Linux bootstrap script. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/box/ensure` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | POST /box/ensure ‚Äî "make my box ready". |
| POST | `/api/bongos/box/heartbeat` | `any-builder` | `claude_active` | POST /box/heartbeat ‚Äî the box reports it is alive, resetting the idle clock. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/box/host-keys` | `any-builder` | `host_keys` | POST /box/host-keys ‚Äî the box publishes its own PUBLIC SSH host keys (task 1187 / idea 235). |
| GET | `/api/bongos/box/managed-settings` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | GET /box/managed-settings ‚Äî the caller's Claude Desktop managed-settings.json. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/box/me` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | GET /box/me ‚Äî the caller's own box. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/box/source-access` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | GET /box/source-access ‚Äî the box fetches its rank-scoped clone spec + the credential to pull it (ADR 0031 ¬ß6, task 600). |
| GET | `/api/bongos/box/ssh-key` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | GET /box/ssh-key ‚Äî list the caller's registered keys. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/box/ssh-key` | `any-builder` | `public_key`, `label` | POST /box/ssh-key ‚Äî register the caller's own public SSH key. |
| DELETE | `/api/bongos/box/ssh-key/:id` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | DELETE /box/ssh-key/:id ‚Äî remove one of the caller's keys. |
| GET | `/api/bongos/box/terminal` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | GET /box/terminal ‚Äî the caller reads their box's web-terminal URL + credential (the Chromebook on-ramp, ADR 0038: ttyd behind a Cloudflar‚Ä¶ |
| POST | `/api/bongos/box/terminal` | `any-builder` | `url`, `credential` | POST /box/terminal ‚Äî the box publishes its current web-terminal URL + the per-box basic-auth credential. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/box/version` | `any-builder` | `sha`, `committed_at` | POST /box/version ‚Äî the box reports its /workspace HEAD commit so the server can flag a stale box (idea 332 / task 1316, ADR 0072). |

|---|---|---|---|---|

| Method | Path | Rank | Body | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|

| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/invitations/:reqId/respond` | `any-builder` | `action` | POST /goals/:id/invitations/:reqId/respond { action: accept\|decline } ‚Äî ONLY the invited builder resolves their OWN pending invite (task ‚Ä¶ |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/join` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | POST /goals/:id/join ‚Äî join an open goal. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/leave` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | POST /goals/:id/leave ‚Äî leave a goal you're in. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/members` | `any-builder` | `role`, `builder_id` | POST /goals/:id/members ‚Äî the goal's own authority (owner \| manager \| Archon) invites a builder to the goal (task 1762: widened from Arch‚Ä¶ |
| PATCH | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/members/:builderId` | `any-builder` | `role` | PATCH /goals/:id/members/:builderId ‚Äî role management by the goal's own authority (task 1735): the owner, a manager, or an Archon promote‚Ä¶ |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/reopen` | `metic+archon` | ‚Äî | POST /goals/:id/reopen ‚Äî bring an archived goal back to open (ADR 0086 ¬ß6 / BV1.R64). |
| GET | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/requests` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | GET /goals/:id/requests ‚Äî the goal's own pending invite/join-request queue (task 1953): every pending row on THIS goal, both kinds ‚Äî outs‚Ä¶ |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/requests` | `any-builder` | `note` | POST /goals/:id/requests ‚Äî a builder asks to join a (private or protected) goal (task 1952 / ADR 0112). |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/requests/:reqId/respond` | `any-builder` | `action` | POST /goals/:id/requests/:reqId/respond { action: approve\|deny } ‚Äî an owner\| manager\|Archon resolves a pending join-request (task 1952). |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/requests/:reqId/withdraw` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | POST /goals/:id/requests/:reqId/withdraw ‚Äî the requester cancels their OWN pending join-request (task 1953): the symmetric self-served mi‚Ä¶ |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/scope` | `metic+archon` | `add` | POST /goals/:id/scope ‚Äî "ask to widen": add module(s) to a goal's scope_modules (ADR 0086 ¬ß4 / BV1.R64). |
| GET | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/suggest-criteria` | `any-builder` | ‚Äî | GET /goals/:id/suggest-criteria?title=&description=&limit= ‚Äî task 2165. |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/tasks` | `any-builder` | `title`, `description`, `touches`, `est_minutes`, `priority`, `kind`, `discipline`, `value_summary`, `parent_task_id` | POST /goals/:id/tasks ‚Äî bounded task authoring within a goal's scope (BV1.R60 / ADR 0086 ¬ß3). |
| POST | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/transfer` | `any-builder` | `builder_id` | POST /goals/:id/transfer ‚Äî hand the goal to a new owner (task 1735). |
| PATCH | `/api/bongos/goals/:id/visibility` | `any-builder` | `visibility` | PATCH /goals/:id/visibility ‚Äî make a goal public\|private (task 1952 / ADR 0112). |

---

> 8 write endpoint(s) take a JSON body with no declared validator schema ‚Äî their fields are not yet machine-documented. Adding a `validateOrRespond` schema (`src/bongos/routes/_helpers.js`) surfaces them here automatically.
